meanings.definition: the act of conducting a controlled test or investigation

examples: it was an experiment in living
not all experimentation is done in laboratories

meanings.definition: a venture at something new or different
examples: as an experiment he decided to grow a beard

meanings.definition: to conduct a test or investigation
examples: We are experimenting with the new drug in order to fight this disease

meanings.definition: try something new, as in order to gain experience
examples: The composer experimented with a new style
